nasb.text: Everyone who eats it will bear his iniquity, for he has profaned the holy thing of the Lord; and that person shall be cut off from his people.

esv.text: and everyone who eats it shall bear his iniquity, because he has profaned what is holy to the Lord, and that person shall be cut off from his people.

cnv.text: 那吃祭肉的人，要擔當自己的罪責，因為他褻瀆了耶和華的聖物；那人必從自己的族人中被剪除。

ccb.text: 那人要自担罪责，因为他亵渎了我的圣物。要将他从民中铲除。
